Please ensure that your PR follows the following format for the title:

ref(scope): refactor code

resolution.summary:
## Problem Statement

The external-secrets api module depends on v0.34 of the k8s controller runtime, which can lead to dependency conflicts with other components.

## Related Issue

Fixes #...

## Proposed Changes

Bump the k8s api dependencies to 0.35.0. This includes a change to how webhooks are registered,
requiring that the apitype be passed to `ctrl.NewWebhookManagedBy`.

This change made it awkward to use the GenericStoreValidator, essentially because the
webhookBuilder.WithValidator now uses generics, but we can't add generics to GenericStoreValidator makes it incompatible with kubebuilder code-gen.

As a workaround, I've removed GenericStoreValidator and added explicit types for SecretStoreValidator and ClusterSecretStoreValidator.

## Format

Please ensure that your PR follows the following format for the title:
```
feat(scope): add new feature
fix(scope): fix bug
docs(scope): update documentation
chore(scope): update build tool or dependencies
ref(scope): refactor code
clean(scope): provider cleanup
test(scope): add tests
perf(scope): improve performance
desig(scope): improve design
```

Where `scope` is _optionally_ one of:
- charts
- release
- testing
- security
- templating
